name: Future Generation Global Limited
analysis: FGG has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at A$1.6481. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
